hero.description: Personalized nutrition plans backed by science. Transform your health with expert guidance tailored to your lifestyle, cultural preferences, and health goals.

services.title: How I Can Help You
services.subtitle: Comprehensive nutrition services designed to transform your health

items.title: Weight Management
items.description: Sustainable weight loss or gain programs tailored to your body type, lifestyle, and cultural dietary preferences.

items.title: Disease Management
items.description: Nutrition plans for diabetes, hypertension, heart conditions, and other health conditions with medical oversight.

items.title: Prenatal & Postnatal
items.description: Specialized nutrition care for expecting and new mothers ensuring optimal health for both mother and baby.

items.title: Family Nutrition
items.description: Complete nutrition guidance for the whole family, from children's healthy development to elderly dietary needs.

items.title: Meal Planning
items.description: Custom meal plans with delicious Egyptian and Mediterranean recipes that fit your caloric and nutritional goals.

items.title: Health Analysis
items.description: In-depth body composition analysis, metabolic testing, and regular progress tracking with detailed reports.

about.text1: With over 8 years of experience in clinical nutrition, I specialize in creating personalized nutrition plans that work with your lifestyle, not against it. My approach combines evidence-based nutrition science with a deep understanding of Egyptian and Middle Eastern dietary traditions.
about.text2: I believe that healthy eating shouldn't mean giving up the foods you love. Instead, it's about finding the right balance and making informed choices that support your health goals while honoring your cultural heritage.
